narrative:
Precinct West Alexandria Village South (precinct in Preble County) has 575 registered voters, with 54.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.7 percentage points.
